ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Type of record (e.g., APBA: 1/4 mile - Straightaway) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the race took place */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Distance of the race */,
  "laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps in the race */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of race (e.g., Straightaway, Closed-Course) */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed achieved in the race */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "track_conditions" TEXT /* Track conditions during the race */,
  "race_duration" TEXT /* Total duration of the race */,
  "race_status" TEXT /* Status of the race (e.g., completed, canceled, postponed) */,
  "race_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the driver */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the driver */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Racing license number of the driver */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the driver has been racing */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the driver */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the driver's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the owner */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the owner */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the owner */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the owner registered with the organization */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the owner */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the owner's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boats" (
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boat */,
  "boat_name" TEXT /* Name of the boat */,
  "hull_type" TEXT /* Type of hull */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the boat */,
  "build_date" TEXT /* Date the boat was built */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date the next maintenance is due */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about maintenance activities */,
  "current_value" TEXT /* Current estimated value of the boat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boats_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engines" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine */,
  "engine_name" TEXT /* Name of the engine */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the engine */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the engine */,
  "build_date" TEXT /* Date the engine was built */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date the next maintenance is due */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about maintenance activities */,
  "current_value" TEXT /* Current estimated value of the engine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race participant */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engine */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the participant */,
  "finish_position" INTEGER /* Finishing position of the participant */,
  "qualifying_time" TEXT /* Qualifying time for the race */,
  "race_time" TEXT /* Total time taken by the participant to complete the race */,
  "penalties" TEXT /* Penalties incurred during the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_participants_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_participants_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_participants_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_participants_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES engines ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., race official, driver, analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has admin privileges */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
